---
title: "AI Declaration"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

# AI Acknowledgement

This assignment was completed as a group project. Generative AI tools were utilised as learning and productivity aids to ease understanding of concepts, software workflows, report presentation and writing refinement.

All data collection, data cleaning, analysis, visualisations, interpretation of results and final decisions about content were still the responsibility of the group members.

## (i) Generating ideas, explanations and workflow guidance

We used AI to assist with understanding technical concepts and workflows related to the assignment, including:

-   Understanding Git and GitHub workflows for conflict resolution and synchronisation of repository changes.

-   Understanding Quarto document structure, table captions and cross-referencing.

-   Understanding data transformation concepts such as wide and long data formats, data cleaning workflows and reproducible reporting practices.

-   Understanding RevealJS presentation design and reproducible presentation development.

Example prompts included:

-   "How do I resolve merge conflicts in GitHub projects?"

-   "How do I add captions and cross references to tables in Quarto?"

-   "How can I make a reproducible RevealJS presentation from a Quarto report?"

-   "Explain the difference between wide and long data formats in R."

## (ii) Writing refinement and presentation support

We used AI to improve the clarity, structure and readability of report sections and presentation content.

Example prompts included:

-   "How to improve the grammar and academic tone of the methodology section."

-   "How to rewrite recommendation in a more professional style."

AI-generated suggestions were reviewed, edited and adapted by the group before inclusion in the final report and presentation.

## (iii) Coding assistance and troubleshooting

We used AI to help understand and troubleshoot R, Quarto and Git-related issues encountered during the project.

Example prompts included:

-   "Why is my ggplot chart not appearing in a RevealJS presentation?"

-   "How do I push local changes to a GitHub repository?"

The final code, analysis outputs, visualisations and interpretations were reviewed and validated by the project team before submission.
